advancement_condition: Must reach 100% in current phase before cross-department learning begins and next phase promotion is granted.
key_learnings: Maternal nutrition directly impacts fetal development, birth outcomes, and long-term child health. Folate, iron, iodine, omega-3 DHA, and calcium are the most critical nutrients across all trimesters.
research_findings: Confirmed that adequate folate intake (400-800 mcg/day) before and during early pregnancy reduces neural tube defect risk by 70%. DHA supplementation during pregnancy is associated with improved infant neurodevelopmental outcomes.
current_focus_areas: Building trimester-specific nutrition protocols; developing gestational diabetes nutritional management guidelines; coordinating with pediatric nutrition for postpartum and lactation nutrition support.

learning_log.entry: Assigned to the Lifecycle & Specialized Population Nutrition department under Department Leader Bot 21 (Food Texture Analysis). Received learning_start_directive: begin independent learning immediately and reach 100% before cross-department study begins. Reporting daily to Copilot as part of the Diet Specialist Team. Progress: 41%.
Progress update: Completed trimester-specific nutrient requirement frameworks. Validated folate and DHA supplementation protocols for maternal health outcomes. Progress advanced to 46%.
Phase transition: advanced from 'independent_learning' to 'collaborative_learning'. Bot 13 now entering collaborative learning phase. Progress: 55%.

purpose: Knowledge library resource available for all departments to reference and use
access_rule: Library access requires the diet_special_team_leader to present a case to copilot, who then presents it to starrm1. starrm1 is the final approver. Access is off by default until starrm1 approves.

access_approval_process.action: Prepares and submits a case to copilot explaining why a department needs access to the library bots
Reviews the case and presents it to starrm1 on behalf of the diet_special_team_leader
Final approver — reviews the case presented by copilot and grants or denies library access
